mapper.select: SELECT tp.id as typeId, tp.name as itemName, tp.courseId as courseId, tp.classroomId as classroomId, c.courseChineseName as courseName, cl.classroomName as classroomName, CASE WHEN tp.catelog = '1' THEN '作业' WHEN tp.catelog = '2' THEN '考试' ELSE '未知' END as itemType FROM pm_testpaper tp LEFT JOIN cm_course c ON tp.courseId = c.id LEFT JOIN cm_classroom cl ON tp.classroomId = cl.id WHERE tp.classroomId = #{classroomId} AND tp.status = 1 AND tp.locked = 0 ORDER BY tp.createTime DESC

SELECT pp.id as typeId, pp.name as itemName, pp.classroomId as classroomId, c.id as courseId, c.courseChineseName as courseName, cl.classroomName as classroomName, '实验' as itemType FROM pm_practice pp LEFT JOIN cm_classroom cl ON pp.classroomId = cl.id LEFT JOIN cm_course c ON cl.courseId = c.id WHERE pp.classroomId = #{classroomId} AND pp.status = 1
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM fe_assessment_items WHERE id IN
#{id}
